case_title: DAVID RUFFMAN ET AL VS. WAI KING HO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 57093975) FILED BY DEFENDANT HO, WAI KING HO, CELINE HO, LIANG MEI ZHU (SUED AS LIANG MEI HO) HO, MICHAEL ZHU (SUED AS MICHAEL ZHO HO) JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WAI KING HO, CELINE HO, LIANG MEI, ZHU HO, AND MICHAEL ZHU HO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE THE AMOUNT OF ECONOMIC LOSSES AND CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES CLAIMED IN THE COMPLAINT. DAMAGES RE: MENTAL AND EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, PHYSICAL INJURY ARE SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. THE PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: R. GOULDING; DEPT.501; NOT REPORTED

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows EFENDANTS WAI HO, CELINE HO, LIANG MEI ZHU HO and MICHAEL ZHU HO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege the amount of economic losses and consequential damages claimed in the complaint. Damages re: mental and emotional distress, physical injury are sufficiently alleged. The prevailing party to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: R. Goulding; Dept.501; Not Reported
